body: Lena, great catching up with you at the [SynBio + Climate Summit](events/synbio-climate-summit-2025) last week — I always leave our conversations with at least three new things to think about. I wanted to follow up on the conversation we started around early-stage AI infrastructure plays that have a credible climate angle, because I think there's more overlap between your current thesis and what we're seeing at [Halfway Capital](orgs/halfway-capital) than either of us initially realized. We've been tracking a handful of companies doing interesting work at the intersection of grid optimization and ML inference efficiency, and I'd love to compare notes before we both head into end-of-year portfolio reviews. Would you have 30 minutes sometime in the next two weeks for a proper call? I can work around your schedule — just send me a few windows that work and I'll make it happen.
